channel.title: Wheel-Variants on Bernát Gábor — Python packaging, tox, virtualenv & open source
channel.description: Engineering notes from Bernát Gábor — PyPA maintainer of tox, virtualenv, pipx, filelock, and platformdirs. Python packaging, type hints, and supply chain security.

item.title: PyCon US 2026 Packaging Summit Recap
item.author: Bernát Gábor
